title: EJSB
subtitle: NYC DP, Photographer, and Editor
clients: Nike · NFL · Adidas Football · Bauer Hockey · Tom Brady · Shark Ninja · Noah NY · NBA · LIV Golf · PGA of America · PGA Tour · New York Jets · NOBULL · NYCFC · Shopify · Omaha Productions · The Ivy League
about_bio:
Ethan Byrne is a Director of Photography, photographer, and director based in New York City, operating out of a production studio in DUMBO, Brooklyn. His work spans sports, commercial campaigns, and brand storytelling — with a focus on creating content that moves at the speed and intensity of the subjects it captures.

His client roster includes Nike, NFL, Adidas Football, Bauer Hockey, NBA, Tom Brady, LIV Golf, PGA of America, and others. Whether shooting on an ARRI ALEXA 35 for a global campaign or running a lean crew for editorial and event coverage, the approach stays the same: get close, stay sharp, and make every frame count.

Before New York, Ethan built his craft across a range of production environments — from live sports broadcasts to studio-based commercial work — developing a technical fluency that allows him to move between disciplines without losing the editorial eye that defines his work.
about_title: Director of Photography · Photographer · Editor — New York City
